name: Grapefruit Health
location: At Grapefruit Health we are addressing the massive staffing shortage in healthcare by creating the first national workforce composed completely of clinical students (ie. social work, pharmacy, pre-med, nursing, etc.). We recruit, train, and manage these students to perform work on behalf of healthcare organizations remotely through our proprietary software. These 1M students create the opportunity for 1B unique patient touch points, and save healthcare workers over 35M hours each year.

name: IRIS XR Inc.
location: IRIS is poised to revolutionize the surgical training marketplace with its collaborative augmented reality (AR) software that is device agnostic. The company's innovative platform enables surgeons to train and collaborate with each other in real time. This immersive and interactive learning experience is proven to improve surgical skills and outcomes. In addition, IRIS's non-provisional patent protects its unique technology, giving it a competitive edge in the rapidly growing AR/VR surgical training market, which had $2.7 billion in revenue in 2022. IRIS is well-positioned to capture a significant share of this lucrative market.
